# Step 2: Choose Output Type

## Overview
Determine the desired output format and content type for the download.

## Output Options
- **Video**: Full video with audio (default)
- **Audio-only**: Extract audio track only (MP3, M4A, etc.)
- **Subtitles**: Download captions/subtitles only
- **Metadata**: JSON metadata without media files
- **Thumbnails**: Video thumbnail images only

## Format Selection
### Video Formats
- MP4 (H.264) - most compatible
- WebM (VP9) - modern, efficient
- MKV - container with multiple tracks

### Audio Formats
- MP3 - universal compatibility
- M4A/AAC - higher quality, smaller files
- OPUS - modern, efficient
- WAV - uncompressed

### Subtitle Formats
- SRT - plain text
- VTT - web format
- ASS/SSA - advanced styling

## Decision Factors
- **Storage space**: Audio-only for space savings
- **Playback compatibility**: MP4 for widest support
- **Content purpose**: Subtitles for transcription
- **Quality requirements**: Higher bitrate for archiving

## Configuration
- Default: Best quality video in MP4
- Audio-only: 192kbps MP3
- Subtitles: All available languages
